water: Pspspsps... your water bowl is empty again. 🐱
Mrow! Cats need hydration too, but today it's YOUR turn.
This is your water check-in. No, your tea doesn't count.
A very serious cat has determined you need water. Right now.
Nya~ Your body called. It's thirsty. Please hydrate.
Zero water since last check. The cat is judging you. 🐾
Water o'clock! Your kidneys will thank you. The cat already does.
Even fish swim in water. You should drink some.
meal: Meow! Breakfast is the most important purr of the day.
The cat has inspected your fridge. It demands you eat.
Hunger makes humans grumpy. Cats know. The cat is watching.
Your stomach just sent a strongly worded note. Signed, Lunch.
Nya~ Food time! Even kibble sounds good right now, doesn't it?
Low energy detected. Cat recommends immediate snack deployment.
This message was written by a well-fed cat who hopes you are too.
Hey. HEY. Eat. The cat insists.
exercise: Stretch like a cat! Your spine will love you for it.
Even cats do zoomies. It's your turn. 🏃
The world record for sitting still goes to... not you. Move!
Your daily stretch goal is waiting. The cat already warmed up.
Nya! 10 minutes of movement = 10 happy purrs from your crew.
A cat has rolled off the couch to motivate you. Don't let it be for nothing.
Bodies in motion stay in motion. Bodies on the couch get nudged by cats.
Five minutes of movement now > an hour of regret later. Go!
bathroom: The cat has claimed the bathroom throne. But do go after.
Gentle reminder: your bladder has rights too.
A quick break is self-care. The cat approves. 🚽🐾
Step away from the screen. Yes, now. The cat is holding the door open.
Your body sent a memo. It says: bathroom, please.
Nya~ A tiny cat just knocked something off your desk to get your attention. Bathroom time!
Hydration check passed ✓  |  Bathroom break overdue ✗  |  You know what to do.
The cat has given you the slow blink. That means bathroom break. Trust the cat.
medicine: Time for your medicine. The cat is already waiting with water. 💊
Mrow! Medication o'clock. Don't make the cat come find you.
Your daily dose. The cat checked the clock twice to be sure.
Medicine reminder — because your future self asked us to remind you.
Nya~ Small pill, big difference. You've got this. 🐾
The cat is sitting on your medication. That's the reminder.
This message was approved by a very responsible cat. Take your meds.
Today's health achievement unlocked: remembering your medication. 💊✓

snooze.5: Fine. 5 minutes. The cat is watching the clock.
snooze.10: 10 minutes. The cat is setting a timer. 👀
snooze.15: 15 minutes. The cat notes this. It will be judged.
snooze.30: 30 minutes?! The cat is disappointed. See you soon.

streaks.3: 3 days in a row. The cat is impressed.
streaks.7: One full week! You've unlocked the Proud Cat emoji. 🐱✨
streaks.14: Two weeks of consistency. The cat bows respectfully.
streaks.30: 30-day streak! You are the human the cat always believed in.
